title: pedilonum hollrungii
intro: Pedilonum hollrungii, also known as the Java water lily, is a type of aquatic plant native to Indonesia and Malaysia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pedilonum hollrungii include treating various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, while also possessing antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Pedilonum hollrungii are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be administered internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
